positive: A whimsical, stylized forest scene silhouette. Center composition features a playful combination of stylized elements: a trio of anthropomorphic woodland animals (fox, raccoon, owl) interacting near a glowing, crystalline portal. The setting includes exaggerated, whimsical flora (oversized ferns, bioluminescent mushrooms) and a meandering river. The overall style is inspired by Art Nouveau mixed with modern graphic design, using bold, flat color blocking and clean line work. High contrast between the deep forest silhouettes and the vibrant, glowing central portal. Excellent for screen printing or apparel graphic design. Studio shot, perfect composition, vector art quality, ethereal lighting, deep jewel tones (sapphire, emerald, amethyst) against a midnight indigo background.
negative: blurry, artifacts, watermarks, text, signature, grain, bad anatomy, extra limbs, ugly, low resolution, monochrome, bokeh, logo, trademark
